seoTitle: Roanoke County Public Schools Calendar 2027-2028: Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: Roanoke County Public Schools 2027-2028 calendar with Aug 12 first day, May 25 last day, holidays, breaks, graduations, PDF and ICS.
calendarNotes: Roanoke County Public Schools starts the 2027-2028 school year on August 12, 2027. Winter Break runs December 20-31, Spring Break runs March 20-24, and the last day of school is May 25, 2028. The calendar lists 178 total student days and includes early dismissals, grading periods, high school virtual learning days, graduation ceremonies, and make-up day notes.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Roanoke County Public Schools start school in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The first student day is Thursday, August 12, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Roanoke County Spring Break in 2028?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 20 through Friday, March 24, 2028.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Roanoke County in 2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school and end of second semester is Thursday, May 25, 2028.

calendarFaqs.q: When are RCPS graduation ceremonies in 2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The official calendar lists graduation ceremonies on May 23-24, 2028.
